semanticOwner: Bundjil agent operations maintainer through the future apps/agent runbook and proof owners
evidence: HGI-301's accepted source receipt is content-addressed by the HGI-308 source receipt and explicitly records unavailable provider readback.
No Vercel CLI or connected provider-readback capability was available on 2026-07-21.
GitHub Actions readback is unrelated to Eve deployment state.
rejectedAlternatives: Infer Production from deployable Eve, Sendblue, or codex-proxy source.
Treat repository, historical proof, or GitHub workflow settings as a Vercel deployment receipt.
acceptedOrDefaultBehavior: Defer the Eve live Production claim. Current architecture remains source-topology only; a fresh, target-owned Vercel read-only receipt is required before any current deployment, provider, webhook, credential, or handset assertion.

taskBlocking.inheritedNonClaim: Runbook drafting must not claim Production until its Vercel readback is recorded.
No production journey packet may claim an external consequence without fresh target readback.

authorityImpact: No external authority is granted. A later target-owned read-only operation requires its own identity, target, redaction, receipt, and stop condition.
nonClaims: No Eve Production, deployment, provider connection, webhook, credential binding, handset outcome, or production readiness is established.
No Eve or Vercel provider operation was attempted or authorized; the read-only GitHub Actions setting is unrelated to Eve live state.
carryingCost: Re-read Vercel state only when an app/runbook/proof task has an approved target and use the dated receipt rather than copying mutable state into durable docs.
reviewOrResumeTrigger: Resume when HGI-303 supplies an authenticated, target-owned Vercel read-only receipt or when Eve deployment topology changes.
